cves.description: A flaw has been found in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. The impacted element is the function setAccessDeviceCfg of the file /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi of the component CGI Handler. This manipulation of the argument mac causes os command injection. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit

A weakness has been identified in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7_cn_svn7958. This issue affects the function fromSetIpBind of the file /goform/SetIpBind. Executing a manipulation of the argument page can lead to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been made avai

Vulnerability of improper permission control in the theme setting module.
Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.
